name: CNA FINANCIAL CORP
summary: CNA Financial Corporation is an insurance holding company incorporated in 1967. It offers commercial property and casualty coverages including surety, as well as warranty, risk management information services, and claims administration. Products are marketed through independent agents, retail and wholesale brokers, and managing general underwriters to small, medium, and large businesses, insurance companies, associations, and professionals across the U.S., Canada, U.K., Continental Europe, and Lloyd's of London.
